title: Elon Musk’s only expert witness at the OpenAI trial fears an AGI arms race
description: Stuart Russell is a long-time AI researcher who thinks governments need to restrain frontier labs.

title: Sierra raises $950M as the race to own enterprise AI gets serious
description: The raise gives Sierra more than $1 billion to work with — capital the company says it will use to become the "global standard" for AI-powered customer experiences.

title: Elon Musk sent ominous texts to Greg Brockman, Sam Altman after asking for a settlement, OpenAI claims
description: Musk texted OpenAI's president and co-founder saying that he and CEO Sam Altman "will be the most hated men in America."

title: AMD is adding HDMI 2.1 support for Linux. That's good news for the Steam Machine.
description: Fixed Rate Link being added now; Display Stream Compression coming soon.

title: Anthropic and OpenAI are both launching joint ventures for enterprise AI services
description: Both Anthropic and OpenAI have partnered with asset managers to more aggressively market their enterprise AI products.

title: Musk’s “World War III” threat in Twitter lawsuit haunts him at OpenAI trial
description: OpenAI accuses Musk of trying to "coerce" a settlement days before trial started.

title: Mac mini starting price goes up to $799, may be hard to get for "months"
description: Chip shortages and demand from AI enthusiasts are both playing a part.

title: 5 days only: Bring a partner or colleague and get 50% off a second TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 pass
description: The BOGO offer is live. For a limited time, buy one pass to TechCrunch Disrupt 2026 and get 50% off a second of the same ticket type. Offer ends this Friday, May 8. Save here.

title: Trump administration cites national security in stalling 165 wind farms
description: Onshore wind development in the United States is being brought to a standstill.

title: MIT's virtual violin offers luthiers a new design tool
description: Computational model lets users tweak parameters to hear effect on the sound in early design process.

title: Tailoring AI solutions for health care needs
description: The AI market is full of big promises of grand transformation. Health care is a prime target for those promises, beset as it is by financial pressures, labor shortages, and the growing burden of caring for an aging population. title: Disneyland Now Uses Face Recognition on Visitors
description: Plus: The NSA tests Anthropic’s Mythos Preview to find vulnerabilities, a Finnish teen is charged over the Scattered Spider hacking spree, and more.

title: Musk v. Altman week 1: Elon Musk says he was duped, warns AI could kill us all, and admits that xAI distills OpenAI’s models
description: In the first week of the landmark trial between Elon Musk and OpenAI, Musk took the stand in a crisp black suit and tie and argued that OpenAI CEO Sam Altman and president Greg Brockman had deceived him into bankrolling the company. title: A Dark-Money Campaign Is Paying Influencers to Frame Chinese AI as a Threat
description: Build American AI, a nonprofit linked to a super PAC bankrolled by executives at OpenAI and Andreessen Horowitz, is funding a campaign to spread pro-AI messaging and stoke fears about China.

title: Cyber-Insecurity in the AI Era
description: Cybersecurity was already under strain before AI entered the stack. Now, as AI expands the attack surface and adds new complexity, the limits of legacy approaches are becoming harder to ignore. title: Operationalizing AI for Scale and Sovereignty
description: Companies are taking control of their own data to tailor AI for their needs. The challenge lies in balancing ownership with the safe, trusted flow of high‑quality data needed to power reliable insights. title: The Download: a new Christian phone network, and debugging LLMs
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. title: How Shivon Zilis Operated as Elon Musk’s OpenAI Insider
description: Messages presented at trial reveal how Zilis, the mother of four of Musk’s children, acted as an intermediary between him and OpenAI.

title: Good Luck Getting a Mac Mini for the Next ‘Several Months’
description: Apple CEO Tim Cook told analysts that AI adoption has happened faster than expected.

title: Musk v. Altman Kicks Off, DOJ Guts Voting Rights Unit, and Is the AI Job Apocalypse Overhyped?
description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we get into how the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial goes way beyond their rivalry and could have major implications both for OpenAI and also the AI industry at large.

description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
